body:
If you are facing a middle-of-the-night garage crisis or find your car trapped right before work, several highly rated garage door companies service the East Bay and offer **24/7 emergency support**. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/)

Here are the most reliable options covering the region:

### 1\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

  * **Areas Serviced:** Fully covers the entire East Bay (including Oakland, Berkeley, Walnut Creek, Hayward, Fremont, Pleasanton, and Antioch). [Garage Door Repair East Bay, California](https://www.precisiondoor.net/locations/california/east-bay#:~:text=We're%20not%20just%20qualified)

  * **Emergency Support Details:** They have live operators answering calls 24/7 to dispatch technicians immediately. Their trucks are kept fully stocked, aiming to resolve 99% of emergency repairs (like broken springs or failed openers) in a single visit. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/#:~:text=Same%20Day%20Service,installed%20in%202024%20in%20the)

  * **Contact:** * Oakland/Berkeley: (510) 969-6700 [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/)

 * Walnut Creek/680 Corridor: (925) 482-6977 [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/)

 * Fremont: (510) 298-3444

### 2\. Right Way Garage Doors

  * **Areas Serviced:** Broad coverage across both residential and commercial properties throughout the East Bay. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=Count%20On%20Right%20Way%20Garage,the%20International%20Door%20Association%20for%3A)

  * **Emergency Support Details:** A highly established local choice with over 40 years of service. They specialize in around-the-clock emergency responses for urgent structural issues, off-track doors, and compromised property security. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=That's%20why%20Right%20Way%20Garage,when%20we're%20needed%20most.)[Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=Our%20technicians%20are%20available%20around,Expert%20diagnosis%20and%20repairs.)

  * **Contact:** (844) 646-9313 or (877) 479-3667 [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=Call%20our%20expert%20team%20now,CHOOSE%20RIGHT%20WAY%20GARAGE%20DOORS)

### 3\. R&S Overhead Doors

  * **Areas Serviced:** Independent regional offices cover specific hubs.

 * **R &S San Leandro/Oakland:** Serves San Leandro, Oakland, Alameda, Castro Valley, and Piedmont. [R&S Overhead: Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA](https://rsdoors.com/#:~:text=For%20over%2060%20years%20the,Piedmont%2C%20Alameda%20and%20San%20Lorenzo.)

 * **R &S Concord:** Serves the Contra Costa area.

  * **Emergency Support Details:** Famous for their fleet of "Red Trucks," they offer 24/7 on-call emergency service for both home garage doors and commercial loading docks/gates. [R&S Overhead: Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA](https://rsdoors.com/#:~:text=510\)%20483%2D9700-,Automatic%20Gate%20Service%2C%20Installation%20%26%20Repair,CALL%20\(510\)%20483%2D9700)

  * **Contact:** * San Leandro/Oakland office: (510) 483-9700 [R&S Overhead: Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA](https://rsdoors.com/#:~:text=Expert%20Garage%20Door%20Company%20in,Oakland)

 * Concord office: (925) 671-7606 [Garage Door Service | Concord, CA](https://rsdoor.com/garagedoorservice#:~:text=\(925\)%20671%2D7606,R%26S%20Erection%20of%20Concord%2C%20Inc.)

### 4\. Nor-Cal Overhead

  * **Areas Serviced:** The entire Bay Area, with a dedicated dispatch line for East Bay residents.

  * **Emergency Support Details:** Family-owned and operated, providing 24-hour emergency spring replacements, off-track alignments, and motor repairs with a same-day guarantee.

  * **Contact:** (866) 363-4821 (East Bay Line) [24 Hour Emergency Service | Nor-Cal Overhead | Bay Area, CA](https://www.norcaloverheaddoor.com/services/24-hour-emergency-service/#:~:text=Contact%20us%20at%20any%20time,Free%20Estimate)

### 5\. Valiant Garage Door

  * **Areas Serviced:** Tri-Valley area (Pleasanton, Dublin, Livermore, San Ramon) and Fremont.

  * **Emergency Support Details:** IDA-certified technicians providing rapid same-day response and 24/7 emergency dispatch for broken hardware and lockouts.

  * **Contact:** Available via their local Tri-Valley dispatch on their direct site.

> 💡 **Quick Tip for Emergency Calls:** When you call, explicitly state if your vehicle is trapped inside or if your home's security is compromised (e.g., the door is stuck wide open). Companies often prioritize these specific safety emergencies to get a technician to you even faster.

By the way, to unlock the full functionality of all Apps, enable [Gemini Apps Activity](https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini).
